title: Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
